capabilities.name: Workspace initialization
capabilities.safety_notes: Creates local directories only; no network or credential access.
capabilities.reviewer_notes: Straightforward template copy into a local directory.

capabilities.name: Configuration management
capabilities.safety_notes: Atomic TOML writes. Secrets redacted in logs. Env-var precedence respected.
capabilities.reviewer_notes: Rich schema with nested Pydantic models.

capabilities.name: Interactive setup wizard
capabilities.safety_notes: Wizard does not auto-enable live trading. Defaults to safe settings.
capabilities.reviewer_notes: prompt-toolkit based; guides user through provider, model, broker, trust mode.

capabilities.name: Discipline profile management
capabilities.safety_notes: Validates forbidden phrases ('ignore risk limits', 'bypass kill switch') and requires non-overridable safety sentence.
capabilities.reviewer_notes: Gate before agent loop starts.

capabilities.name: Model provider selection
capabilities.safety_notes: Provider-neutral; no provider is privileged. Credentials resolved via env or .env.atlas.
capabilities.known_gaps: Google OAuth/ADC scaffolded but not fully wired.
capabilities.reviewer_notes: 15+ provider profiles with alias normalization and env precedence.

capabilities.name: Validation and readiness checks
capabilities.safety_notes: Read-only. Checks workspace, config, provider, discipline, market symbol, audit, risk. Live readiness returns 'requires review' or False.
capabilities.reviewer_notes: Deterministic local check; no network or broker calls.

capabilities.name: Paper workflow
capabilities.safety_notes: Paper mode is always available and safe. No credentials required. Cash and position tracking enforced.
capabilities.reviewer_notes: Fully functional simulation with PortfolioState tracking.

capabilities.name: Backtest execution
capabilities.safety_notes: Local CSV-only; no network. Deterministic simulation.
capabilities.known_gaps: Strategy pack implemented with buy_and_hold, moving_average_cross, rsi_mean_reversion. More strategies can be added via registry.
capabilities.reviewer_notes: MVP backtest with slippage and commission.

capabilities.name: Sample data generation
capabilities.safety_notes: Generates deterministic local CSV with DEMO-SYMBOL. No network.
capabilities.reviewer_notes: 15-bar deterministic fixture for smoke tests.

capabilities.name: Portfolio state and journal visibility
capabilities.safety_notes: Local Markdown and JSON state only. No broker sync in paper mode beyond PaperBrokerAdapter.
capabilities.reviewer_notes: PortfolioState tracks cash, positions, realized PnL, and trade history.

capabilities.name: Research session management
capabilities.safety_notes: Default provider is deterministic (no network). Perplexity provider implemented but not wired as default.
capabilities.known_gaps: Perplexity provider is implemented but not the default.
capabilities.reviewer_notes: Comprehensive artifact store with hash validation.

capabilities.name: Research planning and evaluation
capabilities.safety_notes: Artifact chain validates boolean safety invariants and forbidden phrases.
capabilities.reviewer_notes: 20+ linked artifact types with hash validation.

capabilities.name: Research artifact timeline and health checks
capabilities.safety_notes: Local-only artifact inspection. No provider or broker calls.
capabilities.reviewer_notes: Deterministic local checks over the artifact chain.

capabilities.name: Provider safety dossier
capabilities.safety_notes: Aggregates safety artifacts into a single exportable dossier. No provider calls in deterministic mode.
capabilities.reviewer_notes: Useful for release readiness verification.

capabilities.name: Provider mock response workflow
capabilities.safety_notes: Mock responses are local-only. No real provider calls. Sandbox review validates safety invariants.
capabilities.reviewer_notes: Complete mock pipeline: simulate -> import -> sandbox review -> trust decision -> safety seal.

capabilities.name: Provider execution dry-run and preflight artifacts
capabilities.safety_notes: Dry-run artifacts simulate provider execution without network calls. Preflight freeze captures config fingerprint.
capabilities.known_gaps: These are audit/documentation boundaries, not runtime locks that prevent API calls.
capabilities.reviewer_notes: Extensive artifact chain for provider execution governance.

capabilities.name: Release candidate readiness and cutover
capabilities.safety_notes: Read-only readiness checks. Cutover dry-run does not tag, push, or publish.
capabilities.reviewer_notes: Used for internal release management, not public reviewer workflows.

capabilities.name: Deterministic risk gates
capabilities.safety_notes: Decoupled from LLM reasoning. Evaluates kill switch, notional limits, exposure, position counts, confidence, and stop-loss before any order proceeds.
capabilities.reviewer_notes: Core safety boundary. Every order passes through RiskManager.evaluate_order().

capabilities.name: Kill switch
capabilities.safety_notes: Disabled by default. Corrupt state files fail closed (treated as enabled/locked_down). Atomic writes. Ranked escalation: soft < cancel < flatten.
capabilities.reviewer_notes: Two-tier system: legacy controller + advanced controller with heartbeat integration.

capabilities.name: Deadman heartbeat
capabilities.safety_notes: Disabled by default (timeout=0 means off). Corrupt heartbeat file fails closed (expired). Respects market hours by default.
capabilities.reviewer_notes: Async loop monitors heartbeat age and triggers kill switch on expiry.

capabilities.name: Approval queue
capabilities.safety_notes: File-based v2 JSON with SHA256 hash integrity, TTL expiry, and path-traversal blocking. All state is durable on disk.
capabilities.reviewer_notes: Hash mismatch or schema violation raises InvalidPendingOrderError (fail-closed).

capabilities.name: Submit-approved-order dry-run and reconcile paths
capabilities.safety_notes: Dry-run runs validation gates without broker contact. Reconcile is read-only GET (never calls place_order). Live submit requires 8+ conditions including opt-in record.
capabilities.reviewer_notes: 16+ gates in live submit path. Atomic state mutations with deterministic client_order_id.

capabilities.name: Live trading disabled by default
capabilities.safety_notes: Requires explicit config + typed CLI opt-in + valid audit record with config fingerprint and 24h expiry. Leverage must be off. 8+ conditions checked.
capabilities.reviewer_notes: Multi-layer defense-in-depth. Cannot be enabled accidentally.

capabilities.name: Provider execution remains locked
capabilities.safety_notes: No runtime mechanism blocks AI provider calls. Indirectly governed by risk manager and kill switch (which block resulting orders, not the calls themselves). Per AGENTS.md, no direct AI-to-broker execution path exists.
capabilities.known_gaps: No active runtime lock on provider execution. Relies on discipline gates, risk manager, and artifact-based policy.
capabilities.reviewer_notes: Provider execution 'locked' is an audit/documentation boundary, not a code gate.

capabilities.name: Broker execution blocked by default
capabilities.safety_notes: BrokerResolver returns execution_broker=None for live unless status.can_submit is True. Paper mode is always ready. Live sync failures fail closed and block submission.
capabilities.known_gaps: Binance broker is partial; CCXT and IBKR are disabled/placeholder.
capabilities.reviewer_notes: Alpaca read-only sync is implemented. Live submit is fully gated.

capabilities.name: Audit logs
capabilities.safety_notes: JSONL with SHA256 hash chain. Secret redaction before writing. Recovery on startup restores last_hash.
capabilities.reviewer_notes: Every event linked cryptographically to the previous one.

capabilities.name: Tamper-evident hash-chain
capabilities.safety_notes: Per-run manifest seals with root_hash. Verification detects hash mismatches, broken links, and tail deletion.
capabilities.reviewer_notes: verify_audit_log() replays the entire chain.

capabilities.name: Event logs
capabilities.safety_notes: Daily JSONL with schema validation and secret detection (find_likely_secrets). Redaction runs twice before writing.
capabilities.reviewer_notes: Doctor diagnoses invalid JSON, schema violations, secret leaks, and incomplete runs.

capabilities.name: Replay and read-only inspection
capabilities.safety_notes: Purely analytical. Never mutates state. Groups events by run_id and sorts by timestamp.
capabilities.reviewer_notes: Reconstructs ReplaySummary from event files.

capabilities.name: Release evidence bundle
capabilities.safety_notes: Local-only JSON and Markdown report. No network, no credentials, no broker contact.
capabilities.reviewer_notes: Gathers version, git metadata, check results, and protected boundary status.

capabilities.name: Memory ingest and search
capabilities.safety_notes: SQLite FTS5 with graceful fallback to LIKE scan. Local Markdown files only.
capabilities.reviewer_notes: Indexes all .md files in memory_dir with mtime/size tracking.

capabilities.name: Markdown memory files
capabilities.safety_notes: Plaintext Markdown in memory_dir. No secrets or credentials stored by default.
capabilities.reviewer_notes: portfolio.md, watchlist.md, open_positions.md, trade_journal.md, strategy_rules.md, daily_notes.md, weekly_review.md.

capabilities.name: Memory index rebuild
capabilities.safety_notes: Drops and recreates FTS5 virtual table. Reindexes all .md files.
capabilities.reviewer_notes: Best-effort: falls back to LIKE scan if FTS5 unavailable.

capabilities.name: Skills proposals, approval, archive, show, diff
capabilities.safety_notes: File moves with metadata tracking. Diff between proposed and active versions.
capabilities.known_gaps: Skill miner is a static placeholder with no LLM integration.
capabilities.reviewer_notes: Lifecycle plumbing is complete. Skill extraction is rule-based/static.

capabilities.name: Self-improvement learning loop
capabilities.safety_notes: Orchestration exists but sub-components are static templates. No LLM calls in the learning layer.
capabilities.known_gaps: Skill mining, reflection generation, and nudges are all rule-based/static placeholders. No AI-driven extraction.
capabilities.reviewer_notes: Early-stage. Learning cycle runs but produces template output.

capabilities.name: Trading routines
capabilities.safety_notes: Discipline-gated. Routine locking prevents concurrent runs. Updates memory and writes reports.
capabilities.reviewer_notes: 5 routines: pre_market, market_open, midday_scan, market_close, weekly_review.

capabilities.name: Scheduler and cron runner
capabilities.safety_notes: GitHub Actions workflow defaults to TRADING_MODE=paper and ENABLE_LIVE_TRADING=false.
capabilities.reviewer_notes: Generates atlas-routines.yml with 5 scheduled jobs.

capabilities.name: Daily and weekly reports
capabilities.safety_notes: Markdown report writing. No broker or provider calls in report generation itself.
capabilities.known_gaps: atlas report generate is implemented. atlas report daily from routine engine remains stub-driven.
capabilities.reviewer_notes: Generic timestamped Markdown writer exists. Report content is routine-driven.

capabilities.name: Dashboard
capabilities.safety_notes: Strictly read-only static HTML. No secrets exposed. No order submission.
capabilities.known_gaps: Broker sync state relies on naive audit log tail-reading rather than direct broker API query.
capabilities.reviewer_notes: Dark-themed static HTML with grid cards for system, kill switch, broker sync, audit, risk.

capabilities.name: Deployment file generation
capabilities.safety_notes: Generates Dockerfile, docker-compose, systemd service, and READMEs. Does not deploy or run containers.
capabilities.reviewer_notes: Template-based generation for common deployment targets.

capabilities.name: Update manager
capabilities.safety_notes: Checks live trading, open positions, pending orders, uncommitted changes, and kill switch before applying. Auto-rollback on failure. Protects .env and config files.
capabilities.known_gaps: Queries GitHub API and PyPI API for version checks (optional network call).
capabilities.reviewer_notes: Git pull --ff-only or pip upgrade with backup and rollback.

capabilities.name: Broker model and protocols
capabilities.safety_notes: Broker-neutral protocol. Every new broker must implement the Broker interface.
capabilities.reviewer_notes: Clean Pydantic models and Protocol definitions.

capabilities.name: Alpaca read-only live sync
capabilities.safety_notes: GET-only sync via urllib. AlpacaBrokerAdapter implements BrokerProvider, not Broker. No order submission methods.
capabilities.reviewer_notes: Parallel ThreadPool for account, positions, open_orders. Fail-closed on critical sync failures.

capabilities.name: Broker adapters (Binance, CCXT, IBKR)
capabilities.safety_notes: Binance is partial (ccxt dependency, flatten_all not implemented). CCXT and IBKR are disabled/placeholder.
capabilities.known_gaps: Binance flatten_all and cancel_order are stubbed. CCXT is disabled. IBKR is placeholder only.
capabilities.reviewer_notes: Alpaca is the only fully implemented live broker adapter.

capabilities.name: Provider catalog and configuration
capabilities.safety_notes: Provider-neutral. 15+ profiles. Credentials resolved via env or .env.atlas. No secrets exposed in CLI display.
capabilities.known_gaps: Google OAuth/ADC scaffolded but not fully wired.
capabilities.reviewer_notes: OpenAI-compatible and Anthropic adapters with JSON fallback.

capabilities.name: ClickUp notifications
capabilities.safety_notes: urllib POST to ClickUp API. Requires CLICKUP_API_TOKEN env var.
capabilities.reviewer_notes: Sends comments to task or creates tasks in list.

capabilities.name: Telegram gateway bot
capabilities.safety_notes: TOTP challenge for money-touching actions (/approve, /kill, /resume, /run live). Secret storage via system keyring. Webhook verification.
capabilities.known_gaps: Telegram passive notifier stub exists in notifications/; gateway bot is a full control interface.
capabilities.reviewer_notes: FastAPI webhook server with rate limiting and sanitization.

capabilities.name: Slack notifications
capabilities.safety_notes: No-op stub only. No actual Slack integration.
capabilities.reviewer_notes: Not implemented.

capabilities.name: CLI command compatibility contract
capabilities.safety_notes: Parser-only check. Does not call providers, brokers, load credentials, submit orders, or enable live trading.
capabilities.reviewer_notes: Guards 174 research commands and 42 top-level commands.

capabilities.name: Reviewer golden-path smoke test
capabilities.safety_notes: Runs in temporary workspace. No credentials, no network, no broker contact, no live trading.
capabilities.reviewer_notes: 10 CLI commands in clean temp workspace.

capabilities.name: Public feedback intake system
capabilities.safety_notes: Templates include safety warnings and out-of-scope lists. No secrets, no live trading requests.
capabilities.reviewer_notes: 6 issue templates with structured reviewer feedback form.

capabilities.name: Feedback label taxonomy and triage
capabilities.safety_notes: 30 labels across 5 groups. Risk labels include conservative 'does not mean' wording.
capabilities.reviewer_notes: Static local manifest. No GitHub API calls.

capabilities.name: Controlled reviewer outreach pack
capabilities.safety_notes: 4 copy-pasteable message drafts avoiding profitability, live trading, broker setup, and credential sharing.
capabilities.reviewer_notes: Safe outreach process for 5–10 technical reviewers.

capabilities.name: Broker roadmap and guarded adapter status
capabilities.safety_notes: Static support inventory with fail-closed guards. No broker API calls in status/list. Live submit requires explicit opt-in, credentials, kill-switch normal, and valid opt-in record. Unsupported/disabled/placeholder brokers are blocked.
capabilities.known_gaps: Binance live submit is partial/deferred. IBKR is placeholder only. CCXT generic adapter is disabled until explicitly configured.
capabilities.reviewer_notes: Read-only status command is safe. Guards raise BrokerConfigurationError for all unsupported paths.

capabilities.name: Historical v0.5.7 release record check
capabilities.safety_notes: Local git show only. No network. Verifies v0.5.7 tag history and current dev posture.
capabilities.reviewer_notes: Accepts 0.5.8rc1 while verifying historical v0.5.7 tag.
